A.  BEYOND SHIP’S RAIL - 8.5
B.  BEYOND SHIP’S RAIL WITH MAXIMUM CARGO LIFT ON HOOK - 8.5

FILLING VOLUME (M3)    PILLED DENSITY (T/M3)    ADM. LIFTING CAPACITY/SWL(T)
V1=10,0            1,5                15,0

V3=6,0            2,5                15,0
-CO2 FITTED
-LOGS FITTED, BUT W/O STATIONARY STANCHIONS.
-LAKES FITTED – NO
-LADDERS: AUSTRALIAN TYPE.
-STRENGTH OF THE TOP TANKS:
22 TONS/SQ.M FOR HOLDS NOS.1,3&5
16 TONS/SQ.M FOR HOLDS NOS.2&4
-VESSEL HAS EXHAUSTED MECHANICAL VENTILATION IN THE HOLDS, WITH RATE 6 AIR CHANGE/HOUR.
-MAIN ENGINE: B&W 6S42MC-MK-7 6480 KWT X 136 RPM.
-GENERATOR ENGINE: 3 X YANMAR 6 NI8AL-UV X 500 KW
- BALLAST WATER TREATMENT SYSTEM: ALFA LAVAL PUREBALLAST 3.2 500 COMPACT FLEX USCG, UV + FILTER, 500 M3/H
VESSEL\'S SPEED AND BUNKER CONSUMPTION:
SEA SPEED (LADEN/BALLAST)/ CONSUMPTION AT SEA(VLSFO 380CST):
12.0/12.5KNOTS - 15.0 MT/DAY ME PLUS 2.0 MT/DAY GE;
M/E & G/E FUEL: VLSFO RMG 380 CST/50 C IN ACCORDANCE WITH ISO 8217:2010E WITH
CALCULATED CARBON AROMATICITY INDEX NOT MORE THAN 850. THE FUEL SHALL
BE FREE FROM INORGANIC ACIDS AND FROM USED LUBRICATING OILS.
THE FUEL SHOULD NOT INCLUDE ANY ADDED SUBSTANCE OR CHEMICAL WASTE WHICH
JEOPARDIZES THE SAFETY OF SHIPS OR ADVERSELY AFFECTS THE PERFORMANCE OF THE MACHINERY, ETC, IN ACCORDANCE WITH CLAUSE 5 OF THE ISO 8217:2010E.
FOR INCINERATOR: 100 KG/DAY MDO/DMB (IN ACCORDANCE WITH ISO 8217:2010E)
- FOR PURPOSE OF FUEL SLUDGE AND GARBAGE INCINERATION (MARPOL ANNEX VI).
THE ABOVE STATED SPEED AND BUNKER CONSUMPTION FIGURES AT SEA ARE STATED PROVIDED THE ABSENCE OF (ADVERSE) COMING CURRENT AND/OR NEGATIVE INFLUENCE OF SWELL, I.E. WHEN GOOD WEATHER CONDITIONS - WIND MAXIMUM BEAUFORT FORCE 2 (UP TO 3.5 M/SEC), CALM (SWH UPTO 0.5 M) AND DEEP SEA AND PROVIDED VESSEL\'S UNDERWATER HULL AND PROPELLER ARE CLEAN FROM FOULING. VESSEL\'S M/E BURNS MDO/DMB WHEN MANEUVERING/APPROACHING NARROWS OR RESTRICTED WATERS INCLUDING CANALS/RIVERS/SHALLOW WATERS/STEAMING IN FOG CONDITIONS.
GENERATOR ENGINE CONSUMPTION IN PORT:
A) WITH CARGO OPERATIONS - 4.0 MT VLSFO 380 CST PER DAY(2 WORKING DG)
B) W/O CARGO OPERATIONS - 2.0 MT VLSFO 380 CST PER DAY
BOILER CONSUMPTION IN PORT OR WITHOUT MOTION:
A) 1.0 MT VLSFO 380 CST P/DAY WHEN OUTSIDE TEMPERATURE ABOVE 15 DEG CELSIUS
B) 1.2 MT VLSFO 380 CST P/DAY WHEN OUTSIDE TEMPERATURE FROM 0 AND UPTO 15 DEG CELSIUS
C) 1.5 MT VLSFO 380 CST P/DAY WHEN OUTSIDE TEMPERATURE BELOW 0AND UPTO -15DEG CELSIUS
D) 2.0 MT VLSFO 380 CST P/DAY WHEN OUTSIDE TEMPERATURE BELOW -15 DEG CELSIUS
ADA WOG.
